canonical_name: Section 80-IAC Tax Exemption Eligibility Certification for Startups
current_value: Applicable documents include incorporation or registration evidence, shareholding details, board resolution where applicable, income-tax return acknowledgements, audited financial statements for the applicable years, chartered-accountant certifications and declarations concerning formation and financial information, and supporting material such as the pitch deck and application video as required by the official form.
required_evidence: Official clarification separating universally mandatory documents from documents required only when applicable.
review_notes: The official form lists both mandatory and conditional evidence categories.
